news.headline: QuickStart Learning, Inc. integrates QS Launch to B2B Partner Solutions, aiming to enhance career prospects of early-career professionals through tech training.
news.summary: QuickStart Learning, Inc. has unveiled QS Launch under its B2B Partner Solutions sub-brand. This addition aims to aid organizations in revamping their workforce and simplifying their hiring procedures. Specifically designed to fast-track the careers of young professionals, QS Launch offers customized technology training and career development opportunities.

news.headline: Aragon Research's new report highlights key players in Intelligent Unified Communications and Collaboration for 2025.
news.summary: Today, Aragon Research unveiled the Aragon Research Globe™ for Intelligent Unified Communications and Collaboration in 2025, showcasing the prominent contributors shaping the landscape of office communication. The report, released in PALO ALTO, Calif. on Oct. 17, 2024, highlights the significant players defining the future of workplace communication.

news.headline: Ordoro Inc. announces new Batches feature for faster, efficient order processing at higher volumes in Austin, Texas, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: A company known for its expertise in Shipping, Inventory, and Dropshipping software, Ordoro, Inc., has introduced an upgraded Batches feature to streamline order processing for larger volumes. This development aims to boost efficiency and speed in handling orders. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on October 17, 2024, as per a press release.

news.headline: JTC and Saul Ewing to host 3rd Annual EB-5 Industry Conference on Oct 24 in Miami, gathering industry leaders.
news.summary: On October 24th, an industry event will take place in Miami, FL, where prominent figures will convene to talk about the current and future state of EB-5. The event is being organized by JTC, a key player in EB-5 administration, in collaboration with Saul Ewing LLP. This is the third consecutive year for this annual gathering. The news was announced from San Jose, Calif. on October 17, 2024, via PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Women We Admire announces Top 50 Women Leaders in Raleigh for 2024, recognizing diverse talents in the capital city.
news.summary: "Women We Admire unveils the prestigious list of The Top 50 Women Leaders in Raleigh for 2024. Raleigh, serving as the vibrant capital of North Carolina, celebrates an array of talented women making a significant impact in various sectors. With a diverse economy, Raleigh showcases a thriving community, with a notable GDP of $95.6 billion."

news.headline: GTT Group offers blockchain-based object authentication & counterfeit detection portfolio for acquisition.
news.summary: GTT Group, a leading firm offering patent analysis and transaction advisory services globally, has unveiled a groundbreaking patent portfolio focused on blockchain-based authentication for goods and counterfeit detection. This innovative portfolio is now accessible for companies seeking advanced technology solutions.

news.headline: Kristen Nowak named Stand Out 50 Leader by Future of Field Service. President at Unlimited Service Group. Website uses PRNewswire-PRWeb for announcement.
news.summary: Kristen Nowak, the President of Field Service at Unlimited Service Group, has been recognized as a Stand Out 50 Leader by Future of Field Service. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024, in Addison, Illinois. Unlimited Service Group, a collective of local food service equipment service providers, shared this news.

news.headline: AC Direct® offers discount to aid Hurricane Helene and Milton recovery in U.S. Winter Park, Fla., Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: AC Direct® in Winter Park, Florida, has stepped up to assist families and businesses impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton in the US. As of October 17, 2024, they are providing aid to those affected by the recent disasters. This initiative aims to support the community during this challenging time, offering assistance to a significant number of households and business establishments facing the aftermath of the hurricanes.

news.headline: Survey by ResumeTemplates.com: 75% of companies facing issues with worker coffee-badging. More compliance expected by 2025.
news.summary: A recent survey report published by ResumeTemplates.com, the top platform for free professional resume templates and examples, indicates that the majority of respondents are indicating a plan to tighten compliance measures by the year 2025. The report focuses on the usage of ChatGPT and its prevalence. The data reveals that a significant number of individuals are considering stricter compliance policies moving forward. This signals a potential shift in approach in the coming years.

news.headline: Fatty15 supplement, a key in longevity, as per big study in Nature funded by Calico, reveals importance of red blood cell resilience.
news.summary: A comprehensive study published in the prestigious journal Nature highlights the significant role of red blood cell resilience in prolonging lifespan. This groundbreaking research, coinciding with International Longevity Month, was sponsored by Calico - a subsidiary of Alphabet, alongside Google. The study underscores the critical link between red blood cell health and extending longevity. The findings emphasize the importance of maintaining optimal red blood cell function for overall health and longevity.

news.headline: Darrick Walls returns to Hammes Healthcare as VP in Dallas, leading healthcare construction projects.
news.summary: Hammes is excited to announce the return of Darrick Walls to the company as a vice president. He will be located at the Dallas office and will oversee project management for healthcare construction projects, such as new hospitals and outpatient centers. Walls brings a wealth of experience to the role and will play a key role in leading these initiatives.

news.headline: Taiwan Semiconductor boosts chip stocks, Nasdaq rises again, Dow Jones hits new highs with Travelers' bullish boost.
news.summary: The Dow Jones received a positive push from travelers. Taiwan Semiconductor led an increase in chip stocks, contributing to the Nasdaq rising again. The Dow Jones reached new highs as a result. This update was first reported on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Strong September retail sales, including a 0.4% rise and 0.7% surge excluding autos and gas, cast doubt on Fed's upcoming rate cut.
news.summary: September retail sales saw a significant increase, with a 0.4% month-over-month rise, exceeding August's 0.1% growth and surpassing economists' forecasts of 0.3%. Excluding volatile sectors like autos and gasoline, sales surged by 0.7%, the second-largest increase over the past year. The report has caused economists to reevaluate the need for further interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. While a 25 basis point reduction is expected in November, the strong sales data may complicate this outlook. Analysts are debating whether the Fed will move forward with the cut given the unexpected consumer resilience. Chief global strategist Quincy Krosby noted that retail sales defied expectations and raised questions about the need for additional rate cuts.

news.headline: Panda Cares and Boys & Girls Clubs open 100th Center of Hope, investing $51 million since 2020.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the Panda Cares Foundation, associated with Panda Express, has pledged over $51 million to the Boys & Girls Clubs of America since 2020 to aid in academic achievements for youth across Clubs in the country. Recently, they celebrated a significant achievement by inaugurating the 100th Panda Cares Center of Hope at the Boys & Girls Clubs of West San Gabriel Valley & Eastside's famous Estrada Courts Club situated in a public housing project. The center has been newly refurbished and will cater to...

news.headline: Over one million people have had their student loans forgiven through Biden's program to boost Public Service Loan Forgiveness.
news.summary: More than one million individuals have been granted student loan forgiveness through a recent initiative aimed at revitalizing and optimizing the Public Service Loan Forgiveness program.

news.headline: Ameresco wins 2024 Company of the Year award from Frost & Sullivan for energy services industry. Tech products focus on cost savings, decarbonization, and infrastructure upgrades.
news.summary: A leading company, Ameresco, offers innovative products and services across various technologies to drive cost efficiency, reduce carbon emissions, and enhance infrastructure in the energy services sector. In a recent study by Frost & Sullivan on the Energy Services industry conducted in San Antonio on October 17, 2024, significant findings were revealed.

news.headline: Cole Haan partners with Jesta I.S. for digital strategy, focusing on DTC and Endless Aisle tech, enhancing consumer experience.
news.summary: In Montreal, Cole Haan has launched a major direct-to-consumer initiative, utilizing an Endless Aisle/Drop-Shipping approach powered by Jesta's cloud-based Merchandising ERP solution.

news.headline: CarGurus opens new global headquarters in Boston.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, with over 250,000 new jobs created last month. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a surge, with the main index rising by 2.5% to reach 35,000 points. Experts attribute this positive economic growth to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing and construction sectors. The government has announced plans to further stimulate the economy with additional investment in infrastructure projects.

news.headline: Coinbase and Glassnode predict growth in crypto market by 2024, as Bitcoin ETFs gained over $5B in Q3 2021 with $60B total assets under management.
news.summary: In the "Q4 Guide to Crypto Markets" released by Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) Institutional and Glassnode, the analysis highlights the crypto market's growth and maturity despite Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) stagnant price movement in the past six months. The report indicates a rise in sophistication within the market, demonstrated through successful spot ETFs, increased on-chain activities, and higher trading volumes. Notably, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced a significant increase, with over $5 billion in net inflows in Q3. By the end of the quarter, total assets under management for these ETFs nearly reached $60 billion, only nine months after their launch. Additionally, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) also displayed... (The full story is available on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: G.M. CEO Mary Barra remains optimistic about EVs despite slow sales, citing fixed battery issues and a promising future.
news.summary: Mary Barra, the CEO of G.M., announced that the company has resolved issues with battery manufacturing and expects their electric vehicles to start turning a profit in the near future.

news.headline: Vitech joins 2024 Insurtech100 list for innovation with group insurance & pension administration software.
news.summary: Celebrated for its groundbreaking advancements in the industry, Vitech, a prominent worldwide supplier of administrative software for group insurance and pension management, has been honored with a spot on the prestigious 2024 Insurtech100 list. This recognition marks a significant achievement for the company, solidifying its position as a leader in the field. The Insurtech100 list, considered the pinnacle of industry rankings, showcases the top 100 companies shaping the future of the insurance technology sector. This acknowledgement highlights Vitech's dedication to innovation and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: PPG Board declares 68 cents/share dividend, 53 yrs of increases, 505th consecutive payment. Uninterrupted since 1899.
news.summary: The Board of Directors at PPG (NYSE: PPG) announced today the approval of a regular quarterly dividend of 68 cents per share, scheduled to be disbursed on December 12 to shareholders on record as of November 12. This upcoming dividend will represent the 505th consecutive dividend payment and continue the trend of increasing dividends annually for 53 years. PPG has a longstanding history of providing uninterrupted annual dividends since 1899, demonstrating the company's commitment to shareholders. PPG, a company focused on protecting and beautifying the world, attributes these achievements to the dedication and involvement of its workforce.

news.headline: Enlitic buys Laitek for merging AI data standardization and medical imaging. AU$22.5M raised for acquisition.
news.summary: Enlitic has successfully acquired LAITEK, bringing together advanced AI-driven data standardization technology with specialized medical imaging knowledge. The company raised AU$22.5 million to facilitate the acquisition and support ongoing operational activities.

news.headline: Protect AI, led by Ian with Amazon and Oracle executives, honored by Goldman Sachs for entrepreneurship in AI security.
news.summary: In Seattle, Protect AI, led by Ian alongside executives from Amazon and Oracle, has emerged as a trailblazer in AI security. The company specializes in comprehensive security solutions for artificial intelligence, boasting a team with expertise from prominent tech giants.

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida restores power for 99% of customers impacted by Hurricane Milton; outages decreased from 1M to 3K.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the company successfully adhered to or surpassed the anticipated timelines for restoring power in all counties. The number of outages caused by the storm significantly dropped from a staggering figure of over 1 million to around 3,000. For additional information, interested individuals can access the Duke Energy News Center for access to downloadable B-roll footage and high-resolution images. The development was announced from ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Nektar's NKTR-255 shows promising results with CD19-22 CAR-T therapy in B-cell ALL patients; 67% relapse-free at 12 months.
news.summary: A recent study showed that combining NKTR-255 with CD19-22 CAR-T cell therapy resulted in an impressive relapse-free/progression-free survival rate of 67% at 12 months, which was double the rate of historical controls at 38%. Among the nine patients involved, eight achieved complete remission, and all without any detectable minimal residual disease. This groundbreaking research was presented in San Francisco on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Julian Harris discusses the increasing trend of budget cuts in his article.
Sun Title partners with Hispanic leaders to create comprehensive resources for Hispanic home buyers in Grand Rapids, Michigan.
news.summary: Sun Title, a prominent provider of title and real estate services based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, has collaborated with community leaders from the Hispanic population to develop a range of resources aimed at educating and empowering Hispanic individuals involved in buying and selling homes. This initiative, launched on October 17, 2024, seeks to support Hispanic buyers and sellers throughout their journey towards homeownership. By partnering with local Hispanic figures, Sun Title hopes to ensure that this comprehensive set of resources effectively reaches and assists the target audience.

news.headline: AuditBoard's modern risk platform is now used by over 50% of Fortune 500 companies, including 7 of Fortune 10.
news.summary: AuditBoard, a cloud-based platform revolutionizing audit, risk, compliance, and ESG management, revealed that over 50% of the Fortune 500 companies, along with 7 out of the top 10 Fortune companies, have adopted its cutting-edge connected risk platform. This achievement underscores the remarkable reception in the market for AuditBoard's inventive and acclaimed strategy in assisting clients to address risk throughout their organizations. The significant uptake highlights the industry's embrace of AuditBoard's dedication to transforming risk management practices.

news.headline: Evidation partners with 1upHealth to integrate diverse health data for research, enabling consented sharing and linkage.
news.summary: In a joint announcement made in San Mateo, Calif., and Boston, Evidation and 1upHealth revealed a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing patient-centered health research initiatives. Evidation, known for innovating health measurement techniques, has teamed up with 1upHealth, a prominent FHIR® platform provider facilitating interoperability of clinical and claims data. The collaboration intends to facilitate the merging and sharing of various authorized real-world data sources, spanning health records and other datasets. This partnership promises to revolutionize real-world health research by leveraging consented data linkage across multiple data points.

news.headline: Mirantis OpenStack for Kubernetes is the first to offer fully supported OpenStack Caracal, with 3,000 tests and 300 patches.
news.summary: The company based in Campbell, California, is pleased to announce that they are the first to provide comprehensive support for OpenStack Caracal. This latest release has been enhanced for enterprise use through the implementation of over 3,000 tests and the integration of 300 software patches to ensure stability and reliability.

news.headline: Williams Racing and Kraken extend partnership to 2025; Kraken has 13 million clients worldwide, joined as Official Crypto and Web3 partner in 2023.
news.summary: Williams Racing and Kraken have revealed the extension of their global partnership into the 2025 Formula 1 season. Kraken, a prominent crypto platform serving over 13 million users globally, became the Official Crypto and Web3 partner of Williams Racing in 2023. The collaboration aims to propel Williams Racing back to the forefront of the grid. This partnership unites two established and reputable brands in their respective fields, marking a significant step in their fan-focused approach.

news.headline: Cash App and Lyft partner for payments, enhancing rider experience. Combining services to cater to next-gen customers.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance flexibility for digital-first consumers, Cash App and Lyft have initiated a partnership in San Francisco. This collaboration, which commenced today, aims to cater to the preferences of the emerging generation by prioritizing the ease and accessibility of utilizing Cash App Pay for ride payments. By integrating Cash App into Lyft services, riders now have additional choices for seamless travel experiences. This joint venture underscores Lyft's commitment to connecting riders with their desired destinations and Cash App's dedication to meeting the evolving needs of contemporary consumers.

news.headline: Teleperformance's new carbon emissions goals validated by Science Based Targets Initiative, confirming commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: In Paris and New York, Teleperformance (TP), a leading provider of digital business services, declared that the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) has approved the company's latest aggressive short-term objectives for reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions through sound science. The fresh targets, endorsed by SBTi, confirm TP's dedication to harmonizing its sustainability initiatives with the most current climate science recommendations. Teleperformance's new goals aim to significantly cut down on GHG emissions in alignment with SBTi standards, demonstrating their commitment to environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Igloo partners with Minecraft for exclusive cooler collection, releasing limited-edition Minecraft Mystery Box Little Playmate cooler with only 150 units, followed by a nine-piece collection on October 21.
news.summary: In Katy, Texas, Igloo, the top cooler brand globally, is unveiling its initial collaboration with Minecraft, the best-selling video game ever. The partnership commences with the release of the exclusive Minecraft Mystery Box Little Playmate cooler, a blind box assortment with just 150 units on sale starting today. Additionally, on October 21, Igloo will introduce a collection of nine coolers and drinkware pieces showcasing popular Minecraft characters. This collaboration brings together creativity and excitement for fans of both brands, promising unique and limited-edition products for enthusiasts to enjoy.

news.headline: Coconut water market expects to reach USD 22.91 Billion by 2029, growing at 20.01% CAGR. Demand for clean & ethical labels rises.
news.summary: The market analysis report "Coconut Water Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2023, the Coconut Water Market held a value of USD 7.67 Billion, with projections indicating a growth to USD 22.91 Billion by 2029, showing a steady increase at a CAGR of 20.01%. The rise in demand for clean and ethical labeling among consumers is a key trend observed in the global packaged coconut water market. This growing trend underscores the significance placed on transparency and authenticity.

news.headline: Select Medical and SSM Health partner to open 50-bed rehab hospital in OKC in Dec 2024. Joint venture announced.
news.summary: A 50-bed SSM Health Rehabilitation Hospital is set to open in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, in December 2024. This new facility is the result of a joint venture partnership between Select Medical Corporation and SSM Health. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Annual Wealth Access Summit in Nashville gathers 30+ banks for peer discussions on wealth management growth opportunities.
news.summary: A company that specializes in combining data hosted a conference in Nashville, Tennessee on October 17, 2024, with industry leaders discussing the potential for growth in wealth management. Wealth Access, a prominent technology provider in wealth data, presented unified insights to assist banks in tapping into this opportunity.

news.headline: Bybit named 'Best Blockchain Company of the Year' at Future Enterprise Awards 2024 with world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates on October 17, 2024, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has been awarded the title of "Best Blockchain Company of the Year" at the prestigious Future Enterprise Awards 2024, presented by Tahawul Tech. This recognition highlights Bybit's excellence within the blockchain industry.

news.headline: IDACORP to release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 31, at 2:30pm MT. Listen via webcast or call (855) 761-5600 with passcode 9290150.
news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE:IDA) is set to announce its third quarter results on Thursday, October 31 before the stock markets open. The company will conduct an analyst conference call on the same day at 2:30 p.m. Mountain Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) to review the earnings for the quarter. Those interested in listening can participate through a live Webcast or by calling (855) 761-5600 for listen-only mode using the passcode 9290150.

news.headline: Nordic and BeeKeeperAI team up to enhance AI-driven clinical support with CDSS for faster real-world impact.
news.summary: A top player in electronic health record (EHR) integration partners with a prominent developer of privacy-focused collaboration tools to enhance the effectiveness of clinical decision support systems (CDSS). RightAI, a platform geared towards empowering life sciences firms, will facilitate quicker creation and application of CDSS. This collaboration aims to boost real-world outcomes, leveraging the expertise of both companies.

news.headline: Ice Energy reaches 5-year milestone with 25.6 MWh utility-scale program in Southern California, partnering with Edison.
news.summary: Ice Energy, a prominent player in thermal energy storage and grid-scale solutions for permanent peak load-shifting, shared significant updates on its Southern California Virtual Power Plant (VPP) Thermal Storage Project. The company has hit a major milestone by completing over five years of successful operations for its 25.6 MWh utility-scale program in collaboration with Southern California Edison, a major electric utility catering to 15 million customers.

news.headline: LF Charities will host Project Jupyter, aiding data science and community innovation; significant impact in millions.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, LF Charities, Inc. disclosed that they are now hosting Project Jupyter, an open source initiative known for developing software and standards used by millions worldwide for interactive computing, data science, and research. This move signifies a significant partnership between the two organizations aimed at advancing the accessibility and utilization of Project Jupyter's offerings.

news.headline: OSE Immunotherapeutics introduces OSE-CYTOMASK Cis-Demasking cytokine tech for improved drugs. Presented at int'l conferences.
news.summary: In NANTES, France, on October 17 at 6:00pm CET, OSE Immunotherapeutics SA disclosed plans to introduce its innovative OSE-CYTOMASK Cis-Demasking1 cytokine technology through oral presentations at upcoming international conferences. The company identified by ISIN: FR0012127173 and Mnemo: OSE will showcase this cutting-edge technology to a global audience.

news.headline: n2 Group acquires X-ISS, a managed services company specializing in HPC and AI, to expand its portfolio.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on October 17, 2024, n2 Group, a company specializing in transformative computing technology investments, has officially acquired X-ISS, a prominent player in high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI). This strategic acquisition aims to bolster the Group's portfolio, which already includes well-known entities such as NAG, VSNi, and BioTeam. The move signifies a significant expansion for n2 Group, consolidating their position in the technology sector.

news.headline: David Dorsett brings expertise to lead digital transformation at Astrix, boosting their solutions for life science.
news.summary: With years of expertise in the pharmaceutical and technology sectors, Dorsett has joined the Astrix Leadership Team, enhancing their team significantly. The company, based in Red Bank, N.J., made the announcement on October 17, 2024. Astrix is renowned for its pioneering strategies and solutions catered to the life science industry.

news.headline: Tattly introduces PEANUTS collection with characters like Charlie Brown and Snoopy in temporary tattoos.
news.summary: A temporary tattoo company has released a new collection showcasing artwork from the renowned PEANUTS comic strip. The collection, launched on October 17, 2024, includes designs featuring beloved characters like Charlie Brown, Snoopy, and Woodstock. Tattly is the company behind this collaboration, offering fans a chance to wear their favorite PEANUTS illustrations as temporary tattoos.

news.headline: Roadrunner ranked in top tier in Mastio LTL survey. launches San Antonio & Laredo service. Improved service and reliability. #LTLcarrier #Roadrunner
news.summary: In a significant development, the LTL carrier based in DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., achieved a remarkable milestone in its ranking due to substantially enhanced service and dependability. As per the report released on Oct. 17, 2024, by PRNewswire, Roadrunner has secured a commendable position as one of the top-rated LTL carriers in the renowned Mastio LTL survey. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to excellence and its efforts in delivering improved services. The survey conducted by the reputable third-party organization highlighted Roadrunner's noteworthy progress in the industry, reflecting its dedication to providing reliable and efficient transportation solutions. Such recognition solidifies Roadrunner's standing, positioning it as a leading player in the market.

news.headline: Kapor Foundation awards grants to academics and journalists focusing on tech equity. New fellows selected.
news.summary: The Kapor Foundation has recently granted funding to both academics and journalists who are conducting research and creating content on topics related to ethical, responsible, and equitable technological advancements and artificial intelligence. This announcement was made in Oakland, California on October 17, 2024. The foundation unveiled its latest group of fellowship recipients, supporting their work in this critical field.

news.headline: Flexjet is offering a $100,000 prize for designing the ultimate private jet interior for their Gulfstream G650.
news.summary: The design that wins the Project LXi Contest will be part of Flexjet's exclusive Red Label LXi Cabin Collection™, which currently features over 50 aircraft interiors. This contest offers a unique chance to create the interior of the esteemed Gulfstream G650, a top private jet in the industry. The competition is chaired by Flexjet and showcases the best talents in aircraft interior design.
